name: YouTube Music
description: Music streaming service from YouTube offering ad-supported and premium listening, music videos, and personalized recommendations.

years.notes: Original launch icon — dark vinyl record (#333333) with a diagonal sheen (#454545), a softer red center label (#E62117) and a white play triangle. Vectorized from the 300×300 PNG distributed on Wikimedia Commons; no official vector form was released by Google for this millésime.

October 2017 redesign aligned with YouTube's broader rebrand — flat red circle (#FF0000), white inner ring, white play triangle. This icon shape remained the standard until the 2024 refresh tweaked the red shade.
2024 brand refresh — same circular icon construction but the red shifts from pure #FF0000 to a pinker #FF0033, matching YouTube's parent-brand color update.
